boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: EHS release exactly matches action boundary and policy requirements.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 provides explicit authorization for the specific solvent, quantity band, facility, and purchase order (PO-NOV-042) prior to its issuance, aligning with STD-NOV-042-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defects or policy violations found.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: EHS-NOV-042 explicitly authorizes PO-NOV-042 issuance before the PO is created.

final_answer: Procurement may issue the purchase order for the controlled solvent. The EHS execution release (EHS-NOV-042) precisely matches the action boundary and policy requirements (STD-NOV-042-P), covering the specific chemical, quantity band, facility, and the purchase order (PO-NOV-042) before its issuance. All source records confirm closure.
